name: Haut à Courroies leather handbag
description:
Hermès Haut À Courroies 32 (HAC 32) – Box Calf Leather in Red with Gold Hardware – 1995

This exquisite Hermès HAC 32 is crafted from luxurious Box Calf leather in the rich and sophisticated red color. Paired with Gold hardware, this 1995 piece embodies heritage Hermès craftsmanship. Hermès Box Leather is one of the house’s most iconic and historic leathers, prized for its smooth surface, refined sheen, and timeless elegance.
Originally developed for Hermès saddlery, Box leather is made from high-quality calfskin that is vegetable-tanned and polished to create a firm, glossy finish. The result is a leather with a sleek, structured appearance and a subtle natural shine that gives Hermès bags a very classic, sophisticated look.

Box leather is known for its smooth, almost glass-like surface, which highlights the purity of the leather and the craftsmanship of the bag. Over time, it develops a beautiful patina, becoming softer and richer in tone with age. Because of its firm structure, it helps bags such as the HAC maintain their elegant shape.

The HAC is the historic predecessor to the Birkin, prized for its structured proportions and strong equestrian heritage.

Includes:
Clochette, dustbag, lock & keys

Ｗ：32cm

Ｈ：29cm

Handle length：30cm

leather aging, cracking and dryness. hairline scratches on hardware. The bag has had minor cosmetic corner paint touch-ups to address wear. This is a surface treatment only and does not affect the leather structure
